feedback_strengths: Excellent coverage of core protocol differences and architectural trade-offs
Strong use of primary sources including Shopify and Slack case studies
Nuanced trade-off framework that correctly identifies operational simplicity as the primary decision factor, not performance
Clear delineation of use cases with realistic counterarguments
Good historical context showing how HTTP/2 and improved browser support resurrected SSE relevance
feedback_weaknesses: Missing operational/DevOps perspective: no discussion of monitoring, debugging, error rates, or operational visibility differences
Insufficient cost comparison: mentions WebSocket infrastructure costs but not SSE infrastructure or managed service alternatives
Limited coverage of client-side library ecosystem and maturity across languages/frameworks
Scaling analysis emphasizes multi-server scenarios but lacks discussion of small/medium-scale deployment contexts
Some citations lack full transparency (e.g., 'Updated May 2, 2025' without original publication date; Ably report without URL)
